name: Deploy After Tests Pass
description: 테스트 통과 후 zip 패키징 → S3 업로드 → CFN 스택 업데이트 자동 실행

then.command:
set -e && echo '=== Running tests ===' && pytest tests/ -x -q --tb=short && echo '=== Tests passed. Starting deployment ===' && VERSION=v$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M) && PROFILE=${AWS_PROFILE:-default} && python -c "
import zipfile, os

def make_zip(zip_path, source_dir):
    with zipfile.ZipFile(zip_path, 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zf:
        for root, dirs, files in os.walk(source_dir):
            for f in files:
                if f.endswith('.pyc') or '__pycache__' in root: continue
                full = os.path.join(root, f)
                zf.write(full, os.path.relpath(full, source_dir))

os.makedirs('dist', exist_ok=True)
make_zip('dist/daily_monitor.zip', 'daily_monitor')
make_zip('dist/remediation_handler.zip', 'remediation_handler')

with zipfile.ZipFile('dist/common_layer.zip', 'w', zipfile.ZIP_DEFLATED) as zf:
    for root, dirs, files in os.walk('common'):
        for f in files:
            if f.endswith('.pyc') or '__pycache__' in root: continue
            full = os.path.join(root, f)
            zf.write(full, os.path.join('python', os.path.relpath(full, '.')))
print('Packaging done')
" && echo "=== Uploading to S3 (${VERSION}) ===" && aws s3 cp dist/common_layer.zip s3://bjs-deploy-bucket/${VERSION}/common_layer.zip --profile ${PROFILE} && aws s3 cp dist/daily_monitor.zip s3://bjs-deploy-bucket/${VERSION}/daily_monitor.zip --profile ${PROFILE} && aws s3 cp dist/remediation_handler.zip s3://bjs-deploy-bucket/${VERSION}/remediation_handler.zip --profile ${PROFILE} && echo '=== Updating CloudFormation stack ===' && aws cloudformation update-stack --stack-name aws-monitoring-engine-prod --use-previous-template --parameters ParameterKey=DeploymentBucket,UsePreviousValue=true ParameterKey=CodeVersion,ParameterValue=${VERSION} ParameterKey=Environment,UsePreviousValue=true ParameterKey=DefaultCpuThreshold,UsePreviousValue=true ParameterKey=DefaultMemoryThreshold,UsePreviousValue=true ParameterKey=DefaultConnectionsThreshold,UsePreviousValue=true ParameterKey=DefaultFreeMemoryGBThreshold,UsePreviousValue=true ParameterKey=DefaultFreeStorageGBThreshold,UsePreviousValue=true ParameterKey=DefaultDiskThreshold,UsePreviousValue=true --capabilities CAPABILITY_NAMED_IAM --profile ${PROFILE} && echo "=== Deployment triggered: ${VERSION} ==="
